sigma(a^2) = b^2
a,b∈N
1 <= a <= 100000000

sigma( 1 ^2) = 1 = 1 ^2
sigma( 9 ^2) = 121 = 11 ^2
sigma( 20 ^2) = 961 = 31 ^2
sigma( 180 ^2) = 116281 = 341 ^2
sigma( 1306 ^2) = 2989441 = 1729 ^2
